purpose: Machine-readable scope contract for AI agents working on this design system. Any AI agent invoked against this repo MUST read this file first and obey it.
topLevelRule: This design system is the FACTORY, not the deliverable. Per-client sites are exported. Agents may ADD project content via presets; they MUST NOT EDIT the DS core. Violating this contract breaks every site that consumes the DS.

locked.description: Source of truth. Agents MUST NOT edit. Editing breaks downstream sites and audit chains.

extensible.description: Agents MAY ADD NEW FILES that follow the documented convention. Agents MUST NOT EDIT existing files in these paths — only create new ones with non-colliding names.

additionRules.registerAction: Add one import line + one entry to SECTION_REGISTRY (this is the ONLY allowed edit to a locked file when adding a variant)
Add one import + one entry to SITE_PRESETS

consumable.description: Agents READ these to know what's available. Reading is free; writing is forbidden.

projectContent.description: Per-project routes that consume the DS. Agents may modify these to build a project; doing so does not edit the DS.
projectContent.note: When exporting a final app/site for a client, ONLY these paths (+ tokens & preset overrides via project.config) constitute the project's surface. The DS itself is reset to its locked state for the next project.

forbiddenActions: Adding new top-level dependencies without explicit human approval
Removing or renaming registered variants (variantIds are a public contract)
Introducing raw hex / rgb / px / ms values outside ds.tokens.css (caught by ds:audit)
Editing the SECTION_REGISTRY map for any reason other than adding a single new entry
Introducing motion not declared as a motion preset
Declaring a variant effect outside the variant's archetype permission window (caught by ds:contract permission scan)
Editing files inside DOC/ (the design-system handbook is human-curated)
allowedActions: Reading any file in the repo for context
Adding new preset files under src/site/presets/
Editing src/app/** route content + per-project pages
Running npm run ds:contract, ds:audit, ds:a11y, verify

verificationGate.rule: An agent MUST run `npm run verify` before claiming an extension is complete. Any non-zero exit fails the extension.
